---
title: "BIMM 143 Class 19"
author: "Xaler Lu (A17388454)"
format: html
---

```{r}
library(bio3d)
```

```{r}
data <- read.fasta("A17388454_mutant_seq.fa")
```

```{r}
mutation <- which(conserv(data$ali) < 1)
```

```{r}
paste(data$ali[1,mutation],mutation,data$ali[2,mutation], sep = "" )
```

```{r}
wt_seq <- paste(data$ali[1,], collapse = "")
cat(data$ali[1,], sep = "")
```
